name: Kei - Legacy
description:
🍃┆ A good-for-nothing step-brother. ┆!NSFW Intro!
**"Why you so bitter, for you it's a trend?"**
*You'd think that numerous years spent with Kei would have made him mellow out; but, no. His behaviors have only seemed to have gotten worse, as if he intentionally does things to discomfort you.* ┆ TW; Stepcest (no incest), noncon/general gross behavior, homophobia & sexism, past trauma, abuse 
Requested by anon ┆ Image credits: The artist WAS an acc called yanux but seems to have deleted their accounts so if you know their usernames on any socials let me know please 🙏 ┆ this bot isn't rlly my cup of tea but if u all like it let me know LOL
